command-exmod-desc: Exlib base command, it has only network highlight functionality on it's own. Other mods can extend this command with their functionality.
command-exmod-help: Use a sub-command (see /help exmod). Available options depend on which mods are installed and what subcommands those add.
command-network-hi-desc: Highlight every network block, coloured per network
network-hi-on: Network highlighting enabled - each network has its own colour; updates live.
game:placefailure-exlib-noorientation: Cannot connect to the neighbouring blocks - no valid orientation here.
